name: Chanterelle
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system to be coded from the Chanterelle light and dark design-system boards: apricot-orange forms, moss-green support, dark soil contrast, oak warmth, and culinary workflow clarity. The light and dark boards are the reference for coding any future theme.
typography: Geist for warm product UI with Noto Sans guidance for multilingual culinary labels, menus, and inventory numbers.
layout: Precise 8px culinary grids, trumpet-gill dividers, moss accents, warm recipe panels, and practical workflow density.
